Name: Unstoppable
Effect Text: While this is on the stack, players can't play cards.

Name: Sprint
Effect Text: When this takes effect, gain an additional point.

Name: Momentum
Effect Text: When this takes effect, gain 4 energy.

Name: Delve
Effect Text: This costs 1 energy less for each card in the trash.

Name: Snatch
Effect Text: When this takes effect, draw a card.

Name: Entwine
Effect Text: If you played a point and action card this turn, this costs 4 energy less.

Name: Strafe
Effect Text: You can play this in response to actions. You cannot play this during your turn.

Name: Synergy
Effect Text: When this takes effect, you may trash a card from your hand. If you do, draw a card.

Name: Sneak
Effect Text: As an additional cost, put a card from your hand on top of the deck.

Name: Ambition
Effect Text: When this takes effect, put this on top of the deck.

Name: Again and Again
Effect Text: When this takes effect, put this in an opponent's hand.

Name: Erase Reason
Effect Text: You can only play this if it's the first card you've played this turn. When you play this, you can't play cards this turn.

Name: Mulled Over
Effect Text: When this takes effect, each player trashes a card in their hand.

Name: Initiative
Effect Text: When this takes effect, each player trashes a card in their hand, then draws a card.

Name: At Long Last
Effect Text: This costs 3 energy less if a player is a point away from winning.

Name: Efficiency
Effect Text: While this is on the stack, cards your opponents play cost 1 energy less.

Name: Inquisition
Effect Text: When this takes effect, reveal a player's hand, then trash an action card from it.

Name: Overwhelm
Effect Text: This costs 1 energy less for each card on the stack. You can only play this in response to actions.

Name: Insanity
Effect Text: When you play this, trash your hand.

Name: Glacial Pace
Effect Text: While this is on the stack, cards your opponents play cost 1 energy more.

Name: Angst
Effect Text: When this takes effect, draw cards equal to the number of action cards in the trash.

Name: Endure
Effect Text: While this is on the stack, whenever an opponent plays a card, draw a card.

Name: Radiance
Effect Text: When this takes effect, each player draws a card.

Name: Paranoia
Effect Text: While this is on the stack, you can't play cards.

Name: Treasure Anew
Effect Text: While this is on the stack, whenever a player plays a card, they draw a card.

Name: Vitalize
Effect Text: As an additional cost, trash a card from your hand. When this takes effect, put a card from the trash into your hand.

Name: Quad
Effect Text: You can only play this if you have exactly 4 energy.

Name: Invest
Effect Text: When you play this, gain 6 energy.

Name: With the Sky
Effect Text: Opponents may play point cards in response to this.

Name: Sow
Effect Text: While this is on the stack, whenever a player plays a card, each player gains 1 energy.

Name: Reap
Effect Text: While this is on the stack, whenever a player plays a card, each player trashes a card from their hand.

Name: Burning Flow
Effect Text: This costs 3 energy less if you drew two or more cards this turn.

Name: Plead Insane
Effect Text: When this takes effect, trash your hand, then draw three cards.

Name: Unbury Intent
Effect Text: When this takes effect, each player reveals their hand.

Name: Chant
Effect Text: When this takes effect, if there are two or more point cards in the trash, gain an additional point.

Name: Inspiration
Effect Text: When this takes effect, choose point or action. Reveal cards from the top of the deck until you reveal that type. Put it into your hand and put the rest into an opponent's hand.

Name: Forever Borrow
Effect Text: You can only play this in response to point cards. When you do, gain control of that point card and its controller gains control of this.

Name: Trip
Effect Text: While this is on the stack, whenever a player plays the fourth card of the turn, trash this.

Name: Consult the Past
Effect Text: While this is on the stack, you may play cards from the trash.

Name: Dread
Effect Text: While this is on the stack, players can't draw cards.

Name: Bounce Back
Effect Text: Return a point card on the stack to its controller's hand.

Name: Regret
Effect Text: Put a card on the stack on top of the deck.

Name: Reverse
Effect Text: Gain control of an action card on the stack. When it takes effect, return it to its initial controller's hand.

Name: Delusion
Effect Text: Trash a point card on the stack.

Name: Stop
Effect Text: Trash a card on the stack.

Name: Dig for Ideas
Effect Text: Put a card from the trash into your hand.

Name: Kinship
Effect Text: Reveal the top four cards of the deck and choose an opponent. They put one of the cards into their hand, then the rest into your hand.

Name: Search
Effect Text: Look at the top two cards of the deck, trash one, then draw a card.

Name: Grass is Greener
Effect Text: Reveal an opponent's hand. Draw a card.

Name: Rethink
Effect Text: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of the deck.

Name: Prepare
Effect Text: Each player gains 1 energy. Draw a card at the start of the next turn.

Name: Blinding Flash
Effect Text: You may play point cards in response to action cards this turn. Draw a card.

Name: Stifle Speech
Effect Text: Opponents can't play any more cards this turn.

Name: Sort
Effect Text: Draw two cards, then trash two cards from your hand.

Name: Predict
Effect Text: Choose a number, then reveal the top card of the deck. If its energy cost is the same as the number you chose, you may play it for 0 energy.

Name: Lost at Sea
Effect Text: This costs 1 energy less for each card in the trash. Draw two cards.

Name: Debilitate
Effect Text: Trash the top card of the deck. Draw a card at the start of the next turn.

Name: Journey
Effect Text: The controller of an action card on the stack chooses to put it on the top or bottom of the deck.

Name: Change of Luck
Effect Text: Gain control of a card on the stack.

Name: Drown in Fog
Effect Text: Trash a card on the stack unless its controller pays 1 energy for each card in the trash.

Name: Capture
Effect Text: Trash a point card on the stack. Draw a card.

Name: Metamorphosis
Effect Text: Trash a card on the stack. The controller of that card may play a point card from their hand for 0 energy.

Name: Reimagine
Effect Text: Return a card on the stack to its controller's hand. You gain 3 energy.

Name: Anxiety
Effect Text: Choose an opponent to trash two cards from their hand.

Name: Inspect
Effect Text: Choose point or action. Reveal cards from the top of the deck until you reveal that type. Put it into your hand and put the rest at the bottom of the deck.

Name: Enlightenment
Effect Text: Trash a card from your hand. You may trash a card on the stack that shares the energy cost of the trashed card.

Name: By Any Means
Effect Text: Trash a card on the stack, then trash your hand.

Name: Injustice
Effect Text: Opponents can't play action cards in response to the next action card you play this turn. Draw a card.

Name: Unravel
Effect Text: This costs 1 energy less for each card on the stack. Trash all cards on the stack.

Name: Deny Hostility
Effect Text: Trash an action card on the stack that was played in response to a point card.

Name: Icarus
Effect Text: You may play this for 0 energy if an opponent played three or more cards this turn. Trash a card on the stack.

Name: Overconfidence
Effect Text: Trash a card on the stack unless its controller puts a card from the trash at the bottom of the deck. Draw a card.

Name: Brought Back
Effect Text: You may play cards from the trash this turn. Whenever a card goes to the trash this turn, put it at the bottom of the deck instead.

Name: Dividends
Effect Text: Draw cards equal to the number of different energy costs in the trash.

Name: Chains
Effect Text: Trash an action card on the stack unless its controller pays 1 energy for each card on the stack.

Name: Share the Loot
Effect Text: Whenever an opponent's card takes effect this turn, you gain 3 energy.

Name: Last Chance
Effect Text: Draw four cards. At the start of the next turn, trash four cards from your hand.

Name: Reimburse
Effect Text: Trash a card on the stack. Each player draws a card.

Name: Burn Out
Effect Text: Trash a point on the stack. Gain energy equal to its cost.

Name: Unwanted Gift
Effect Text: Trash an action on the stack. That action's controller gains 3 energy.

Name: Abandon Hope
Effect Text: Trash all cards on the stack. Gain 1 energy for each card trashed this way.

Name: Cerebral Snuff
Effect Text: Reveal a player's hand and choose a card from it for them to trash.

Name: Drain
Effect Text: Gain energy equal to the highest energy cost on the stack.

Name: Possess Love
Effect Text: Cards cost 1 energy less this turn.

Name: Reinstate
Effect Text: Trash an action on the stack. Its controller may play the top card of the deck for 0 energy.

Name: Relapse
Effect Text: Trash a card on the stack, then its controller draws two cards.

Name: Steal Intensity
Effect Text: Put a point card on the stack into your hand.

Name: Poke
Effect Text: Trash an action card on the stack unless its controller pays 1 energy. Draw a card.

Name: Reset Memory
Effect Text: Trash your hand, then draw that many cards.

Name: Take Your Time
Effect Text: Draw two cards at the start of the next turn.
